closure_text: Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 97; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-591 updated accordingly.
Containment isolated 32 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Material lot quarantined pending CoA review; disposition set to use-as-is after engineering waiver.
Process deviation from a missed cleaning step; 5S audit added to the shift changeover checklist.
